fields.name: Ongoing Sales Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales invoices that are not yet posted or only partially posted.

fields.name: Ongoing Purchase Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies purchases invoices that are not posted or only partially posted.

fields.name: Sales This Month
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of sales in the current month excluding taxes.

fields.name: Overdue Purch. Invoice Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of your overdue payments to vendors.

fields.name: Overdue Sales Invoice Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of overdue payments from customers.

fields.name: Average Collection Days
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long customers took to pay invoices in the last three months. This is the average number of days from when invoices are issued to when customers pay the invoices.

fields.name: Ongoing Sales Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales quotes that have not yet been converted to invoices or orders.

fields.name: Sales Inv. - Pending Doc.Exch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales invoices that await sending to the customer through the document exchange service.

fields.name: Sales CrM. - Pending Doc.Exch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales credit memos that await sending to the customer through the document exchange service.

fields.name: My Incoming Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies incoming documents that are assigned to you.

fields.name: Non-Applied Payments
fields.tooltip: Specifies imported bank transactions for payments that are not yet reconciled in the Payment Reconciliation Journal window.

fields.name: Purch. Invoices Due Next Week
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of payments to vendors that are due next week.

fields.name: Ongoing Sales Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales orders that are not yet posted or only partially posted.

fields.name: Inc. Doc. Awaiting Verfication
fields.tooltip: Specifies incoming documents in OCR processing that require you to log on to the OCR service website to manually verify the OCR values before the documents can be received.

fields.name: Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies purchases orders that are not posted or only partially posted.

fields.name: IC Outbox Transactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of pending outgoing intercompany transactions.

fields.name: Outstanding Vendor Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of invoices from your vendors that have not been paid yet.

fields.name: Coupled Data Synch Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors that occurred in the latest synchronization of coupled data between Business Central and Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: CDS Integration Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors related to data integration.

fields.name: S. Ord. - Reserved From Stock
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales orders that are completely reserved from stock.
